programmes.show_description: Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
An hour of Nu Metal from the likes of Alien Ant Farm, Evanescence and Limp Bizkit to Korn, Linkin Park and Rage Against The Machine.
Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Stroke, Sum 41, Linkin Park, Feeder & Limp Bizkit. This is Now Rock!
50 mega-anthems that rocked the 00s! With Green Day, Linkin Park, The Strokes, Paramore, Blink-182, The Killers & much more!
The most iconic & ear-shattering rock songs that shaped the genre! Including Led Zeppelin's timeless Whole Lotta Love & AC/DC's rebellious Highway to Hell. Crank it up & enjoy!
Rounding off the week with rock classics and anthems! We guarantee AC/DC, Nirvana, Queen, Meat Loaf, Bon Jovi & much more!
20 epic songs loaded with mega hair energy & power chords! From 80s rock icons Boston, Whitesnake & Chicago to modern day heroes The Darkness, Green Day & My Chemical Romance.
The most fabulous glam rock icons from the satin & glitter of 70s through to the bold new look of today. Glam Rock never left us, it just changed outfits!
Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
From the rebellious teens of the 90s and 00s we bring you the stars who said "To hell with the world" and expressed themselves through great tunes!
The gods and goddesses who have graced our stages and given us some of the greatest rock voices ever. Nicky Horne presents his personal top 30 and agonises over the number 1!
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
The legendary frontman of rock icons Deep Purple has handpicked 25 of the finest bands from the past six decades. It's classics all the way, so crank it up!
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
We open the high school year book with Weezer in 1995 and remember the amazing bands that rocked every school party through to 2005!
in order, the rock anthems that claimed the top 3 in the first decade of this century. From Limp Bizkit in 2000 to Kasabian in 2009!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
A decade of girls and guitars - from Republica and Catatonia to Cher and Debbie Harry.
Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Arctic Monkeys, Nickleback, Green Day & The Strokes. This is Now Rock!
99 anthems of rock from the noughties! With Green Day, Linkin Park, The Strokes, Paramore, Blink-182, The Killers & much more!
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!

programmes.show_name: Nicky Horne's Best Of British Rock
programmes.show_description: Nicky Horne's definitive 30 best British rock tracks from across the decades! Featuring Queen, Yes, Deep Purple, Motorhead, The Sex Pistols but who is the very best of British?
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
